subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out and for your interest in collaborating.

We’d be happy to set up an introductory call next week to explore potential synergies. Please send over a few time slots that work well for you in your local time zone over the next 7–10 days, and we’ll confirm one on our side.

Regarding internal contacts: we’re not able to share direct phone lines or an internal contact directory, but I’m happy to coordinate any follow-up conversations with the appropriate stakeholders on our side once we’ve aligned on next steps.

Looking forward to speaking.

Best regards,
Agent
